TextView.android:text:
Meditation Guide
1. Find a Quiet Place Choose a calm and quiet environment with minimal distractions.
2. Sit Comfortably Sit in a relaxed position with your back straight.
3. Focus on Breathing Pay attention to your breath as you inhale and exhale slowly.
4. Close Your Eyes This helps you concentrate better and avoid distractions.
5. Start with Short Sessions Begin with 5–10 minutes and increase gradually.
6. Let Thoughts Pass Do not fight thoughts, just let them come and go.
7. Use a Timer Set a timer so you don’t keep checking the time.
8. Be Consistent Practice meditation daily for best results.
9. Try Guided Meditation Use audio or apps to help you stay focused.
10. Relax Your Body Release tension from your muscles and stay calm.
